preamble: The shift from [ʌ] to the diphthong [ʊoʊ] or [uo] involves backing and diphthongization. While phonetically plausible, documented examples of this specific transition from [ʌ] are limited in linguistic literature and primarily discussed in theoretical phonetic frameworks.

examples.note: Theoretical pathway of backing and diphthongization; not currently documented in established sound change literature.
